pages.text: An $(bold)Encased Fan$() blows along its axis, and whatever element sits in front of it $(bold)transforms$() the airflow into a processing field. Items passing through that field on a belt or Depot are processed in bulk.$(br2)$(li)$(bold)Water$() → washing (ore washing, cleaning gravels)$(li)$(bold)Fire/Campfire$() → smoking (cooking food)$(li)$(bold)Lava$() → blasting (smelting)$(li)$(bold)Soul Fire$() → haunting
pages.title: Fan Processing

pages.text: Fans are the cheapest mass-processor in Create — no per-item machine, just one fan and a belt running through the field. Ore washing in particular turns crushed ore into nuggets and the occasional bonus.$(br2)A fan also just $(italic)pushes$() — handy for moving items, players, or feeding a furnace engine's airflow.
pages.title: Why Fans
